summary: Write scripts/migrate_to_sqlite_embeddings.py: creates chunk_embeddings, iterates ChromaDB, inserts rows, reconciles counts (Chroma vs chunks vs chunk_embeddings), exits non-zero on mismatch

resolution.note: scripts/migrate_to_sqlite_embeddings.py created; smoke-tested against live data/guru.db — 120 Chroma vectors migrated, blob round-trips (3072 bytes = 768×float32, norm=1.0), FK resolves 120/120 to nodes. Exits non-zero on the expected 2411-chunk gap so Phase 3 is prompted.
